title: xantolis shweliensis
intro: Xantolis shweliensis, also known as the Shweli Xantolis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is native to Myanmar and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The leaves and bark of the Xantolis shweliensis plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into infusions or decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
